scripts.dev: npm run compile && concurrently -k "vite --config electron/vite.config.electron.ts" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.prepare:browser-artifacts: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:remote && npm run build:server
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:remote && npm run compile && electron-builder
scripts.dev:server: concurrently -k "vite build --config electron/vite.config.electron.ts --watch" "vite build --config src/remote/vite.config.ts --watch" "tsc -p server/tsconfig.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on dist/index.html dist-remote/index.html dist-server/server/main.js && node --watch dist-server/server/main.js"
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:solid
scripts.test:node: npm run build:server && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:harness: npm run prepare:browser-artifacts && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/harness
scripts.test:contracts:lifecycle: npm run build:server && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/contracts/review-diff.contract.test.ts tests/contracts/control-lease.contract.test.ts tests/contracts/task-command-takeover.contract.test.ts tests/contracts/git-state.contract.test.ts tests/contracts/reconnect-replay.contract.test.ts tests/contracts/remote-status.contract.test.ts electron/ipc/git-diff-ops.test.ts electron/ipc/task-ports.test.ts electron/ipc/task-review-state.test.ts electron/ipc/task-workflows.test.ts server/browser-control-plane.test.ts src/app/review-diffs.test.ts src/app/review-files.test.ts src/app/server-state-bootstrap.test.ts src/app/session-bootstrap-controller.test.ts src/app/task-command-lease.test.ts src/app/task-workflows.control.test.ts src/runtime/browser-session.test.ts src/runtime/browser-session.runtime.test.ts src/store/persistence.test.ts src/components/terminal-view/terminal-output-pipeline.test.ts && vitest run --config vitest.solid.config.ts src/components/ReviewPanel.test.tsx src/components/TerminalView.test.tsx src/components/terminal-view/terminal-recovery-runtime.test.tsx
scripts.test:browser:canaries: npm run test:browser:run -- tests/browser/review-diff-lifecycle.spec.ts tests/browser/multiclient-control.spec.ts tests/browser/terminal-noisy-background.spec.ts tests/browser/remote-bootstrap.spec.ts --project chromium --workers=1
scripts.test:browser:terminal:shared: npm run test:browser:run -- tests/browser/terminal-input.spec.ts tests/browser/terminal-noisy-background.spec.ts tests/browser/terminal-restore.spec.ts tests/browser/terminal-render-stress.spec.ts tests/browser/multiclient-control.spec.ts --project chromium --workers=1 --grep-invert "keeps a large-history shell responsive across background tab switches"
scripts.test:browser:terminal:background-switch: npm run test:browser:run -- tests/browser/terminal-restore.spec.ts --project chromium --workers=1 --grep "keeps a large-history shell responsive across background tab switches"
scripts.test:browser:terminal: npm run test:browser:terminal:background-switch && npm run test:browser:terminal:shared
scripts.test:reliability: npm run build:server && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/contracts src/runtime/server-sync.test.ts server/terminal-latency.test.ts src/lib/ipc.test.ts src/lib/websocket-client.test.ts electron/remote/ws-transport.test.ts src/runtime/browser-session.test.ts
scripts.benchmark:terminal:attach-recovery: npm exec vitest -- run --config vitest.benchmark.config.ts src/app/terminal-attach-scheduler.benchmark.ts src/lib/scrollbackRestore.benchmark.ts
scripts.lab:terminal:ui-fluidity:hidden-render-w: npm run prepare:browser-artifacts && node scripts/profile-terminal-ui-fluidity.mjs --launch-server --variant hidden_hibernation --profiles hidden_render_wake
scripts.lab:terminal:ui-fluidity:hidden-session-: npm run prepare:browser-artifacts && node scripts/profile-terminal-ui-fluidity.mjs --launch-server --variant hidden_session_dormancy --profiles hidden_session_wake
scripts.lab:terminal:ui-fluidity:hidden-switch: npm run prepare:browser-artifacts && node scripts/profile-terminal-ui-fluidity.mjs --launch-server --variant high_load_mode_product --profiles recent_hidden_switch
scripts.lab:terminal:ui-fluidity:hidden-switch:m: npm run prepare:browser-artifacts && node scripts/terminal-ui-fluidity-matrix.mjs --skip-build --variants product_default,high_load_mode_product --profiles recent_hidden_switch --visible-terminal-counts 1,2,4 --repeats 3
scripts.lab:terminal:ui-fluidity:trace: npm run prepare:browser-artifacts && node scripts/terminal-ui-fluidity-matrix.mjs --skip-build --repeats 1 --trace --trace-profiles bulk_text,mixed_agents
scripts.stress:session:smoke: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --matrix smoke --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/smoke --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:steady-fanout: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile steady_fanout --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/steady-fanout --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:steady-verbose-ag: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile steady_verbose_agents_24 --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/steady-verbose-agents --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:verbose-bulk-text: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile verbose_bulk_text --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/verbose-bulk-text --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:verbose-markdown-: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile verbose_markdown_burst --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/verbose-markdown-burst --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:verbose-code-burs: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile verbose_code_burst --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/verbose-code-burst --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:verbose-diff-burs: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile verbose_diff_burst --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/verbose-diff-burst --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:verbose-agent-cli: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile verbose_agent_cli_burst --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/verbose-agent-cli-burst --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:verbose-statuslin: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile verbose_statusline --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/verbose-statusline --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:verbose-mixed-age: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile verbose_mixed_agents --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/verbose-mixed-agents --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:interactive-verbo: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile interactive_verbose --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/interactive-verbose --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:heavy-tui: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile heavy_tui --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/heavy-tui --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:reconnect-storm: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile reconnect_storm --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/reconnect-storm --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:late-join: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile late_join --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/late-join --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:profile:slow-link: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --profile slow_link --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/slow-link --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:tune:slow-link: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --matrix slow_link_tuning --repeats 3 --allow-budget-failures --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/slow-link-tuning --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:matrix: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --matrix smoke --matrix production --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/matrix --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:matrix:steady-state-verbo: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --matrix steady_state_verbose --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/steady-state-verbose --skip-build
scripts.stress:session:prod-gate: npm run build:server && node scripts/session-stress-matrix.mjs --matrix production --out-dir artifacts/session-stress/prod-gate --skip-build
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.release: npm run typecheck && npm version patch && git push --follow-tags
